channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: AI 2040 Plan A lays out a roadmap to superintelligence that cuts global employment to 13 percent while boosting median incomes
item.description: AI safety researcher Marius Hobbhahn endorsed the framework.
item.content:encoded:
AI safety researcher Marius Hobbhahn endorsed the framework.

Original source: http://ai-2040.com/?r=tw

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/e6r1ol60

  • Views: 14,055
  • Likes: 120
  • Bookmarks: 34
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 5
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Max Tegmark
  • Marius Hobbhahn
  • Anders Sandberg
  • Herbie Bradley
  • modest proposal
The AI 2040 scenario: http://ai-2040.com/?r=tw Plan A is our current best guess, but hopefully a better plan will exist before it's too late. We hope that the best ideas from Plan A will be adopted and the worst ideas discarded. Written with @thlarsen, @romeovdean, @eli_lifland, and @RyanGreenblatt

item.title: China's CZ-10B rocket completes first-stage vertical recovery using a maritime wire-net capture system
item.description: The successful landing makes China the third organization to recover an orbital-class booster.
item.content:encoded:
The successful landing makes China the third organization to recover an orbital-class booster.

Original source: https://x.com/raz_liu/status/2075439491779789173

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/2bwki346

  • Views: 72,631
  • Likes: 873
  • Bookmarks: 94
  • Quotes: 9
  • Replies: 41
  • Posts: 13

Top authors

  • Ashlee Vance
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • xlr8harder
a more accurate illustration of CZ-10B's capture system All four arresting cables move independently really a very clever design, even if it looks too complex

item.title: An AI agent demo shows GPT-5.6 Sol executing rapid 3D modeling inside Blender 4.5.4 at 750 tokens per second
item.description: The system used GUI controls instead of Blender's Python API.
item.content:encoded:
The system used GUI controls instead of Blender's Python API.

Original source: https://x.com/evayzh/status/2075374512401711203/video/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/0fdp9fef

  • Views: 238,349
  • Likes: 3,033
  • Bookmarks: 919
  • Quotes: 28
  • Replies: 102
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • gabriel
  • Chubby♨️
Correction, but tbh: even more impressive lol

item.title: OpenAI's Vaibhav Srivastav details GPT-5.6 Sol's tiered reasoning settings ranging from Light to Ultra
item.description: The Ultra tier deploys multiple subagents to work in parallel.
item.content:encoded:
The Ultra tier deploys multiple subagents to work in parallel.

Original source: https://x.com/reach_vb/status/2075489301253488778

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/4f7fwewf

  • Views: 41,940
  • Likes: 484
  • Bookmarks: 181
  • Quotes: 13
  • Replies: 96
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • xjdr
  • Minh Nhat Nguyen
  • Vaibhav (VB) Srivastav
Ok, I take the naming thing back, this is just as opaque and convoluted as ever (functionality is fine to desirable tho). Never change oai

item.title: OpenAI's Gabriel Petersson advises tech applicants to submit concrete pull requests and designs instead of written planning documents
item.description: Minh Nhat Nguyen says AI-generated text has made planning documents lower signal
item.content:encoded:
Minh Nhat Nguyen says AI-generated text has made planning documents lower signal

Original source: https://x.com/menhguin/status/1765710448962457638

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/worljo7t

  • Views: 51,522
  • Likes: 919
  • Bookmarks: 392
  • Quotes: 9
  • Replies: 34
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • gabriel
  • Minh Nhat Nguyen
i especially hate CVs. what the fuck am i supposed to learn there? it's literally negative information bunch of high level abstract sentences. "leading a project" or "making something 40% more efficient" means nothing send deep insights that no one else could have or something

item.title: China achieves its first orbital-class reusable rocket sea recovery, drawing comparisons to SpaceX
item.description: The medium-class booster utilized unique recovery wires for its landing.
item.content:encoded:
The medium-class booster utilized unique recovery wires for its landing.

Original source: https://bbc.in/4pbjJ01

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/07bygwb1

  • Views: 28,553
  • Likes: 376
  • Bookmarks: 29
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 26
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Lisan al Gaib
China will develop reusability successfully, and within a decade catch up to Falcon 9 launch economics. The future of U.S. space dominance rests on Starship.

item.title: AI-bullish firm blocks Anthropic's Fable over data retention policies, choosing OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol instead
item.description: Gergely Orosz shared the account from a developer at the company
item.content:encoded:
Gergely Orosz shared the account from a developer at the company

Original source: https://x.com/trifon_getsov/status/2075531137753940168

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/vvp22dxv

  • Views: 52,860
  • Likes: 732
  • Bookmarks: 96
  • Quotes: 13
  • Replies: 35
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Andreas Kirsch 🇺🇦
  • Gergely Orosz
Basically, if zero data retention is important to you, only OpenAI offer their leading model with this setting. Fable can store data indefinitely for whatever investigations Anthropic decides they want to use it for, without warning. Not a proposition some enterprises will take

item.title: Proposed Chinese rocket recovery system uses tower-mounted wire grids and magnetorheological dampers to catch returning boosters
item.description: Four sets of adjustable wires secure the hovering vehicle
item.content:encoded:
Four sets of adjustable wires secure the hovering vehicle

Original source: https://x.com/zeg27523084/status/2075472216720822513

  • Views: 80,309
  • Likes: 491
  • Bookmarks: 93
  • Quotes: 4
  • Replies: 21
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Yishan
> how do u damp oscillations with magnetorheological dampers (磁流变阻尼器) plus payout cables git gud

item.title: OpenAI's Yann Dubois says GPT-5.6-Sol beats Claude-Fable-5 on DeepSWE benchmark with lower token costs
item.content:encoded:
GPT-5.6-Sol scored 72% at $8.39 per task.

Original source: https://x.com/scaling01/status/2075366415964451244

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nd32j7bs

  • Views: 5,204
  • Likes: 59
  • Bookmarks: 10
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 6
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Yann Dubois
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Rohan Paul
GPT 5.6 Beats Fable 5 by on DeepSWE at a cheaper price. GPT-5.6 Sol reaches roughly 72% to 73% DeepSWE at about $8.4 per task, while Claude/Fable-5 tops out around 70% at a much higher cost, around $13 to $22 per task. DeepSWE is a coding-agent benchmark, not a normal code-generation test, because the model must work inside real open-source repositories and finish long software engineering tasks. Each task gives the agent a repo and a requested change, then checks whether the final patch actually works using program-based verifiers, so the score means “what % of the 113 tasks were solved.” The benchmark tests repo navigation, bug diagnosis, code editing, tool use, test running, and multi-step repair across 91 repositories and 5 languages, not just writing a neat function from a prompt. On this benchmark, the best model is the one that solves the most tasks for the least average task cost.

item.title: Trump Accounts reaches 6.5 million claimed profiles and $125 million in contributions five days after launch
item.description: Seventy percent of individual payments were under $250.
item.content:encoded:
Seventy percent of individual payments were under $250.

Original source: https://x.com/TocRadio/status/2075308270307221920

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/wtgm4d8i

  • Views: 43,119
  • Likes: 331
  • Bookmarks: 16
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 37
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Brad Gerstner
  • Anthony Pompliano 🌪
Millions of people - moms & dads, friends & family & small businesses making small individual contributions into kids @TrumpAccounts. This is the dream! As easy as Apple Pay - double click on your phone takes < 10 seconds. Give it a try - add to a kid’s dream today! 🇺🇸🚀💰
